case_title: THE TIDES CENTER, VS. TESSEMA BEREKET et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT **PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION INCLUDED**, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-20-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEREKET, TESSEMA TESSEMA BAREKET
